title: hieracium subauricula
intro: Hieracium subauricula, also known as Hawkweed or False Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion-like plants in the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hieracium subauricula include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic and arthritic pain, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tincture, tea, or infusion, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
